description_long: This is a three-story office building with a flat roof, painted in a muted pink color with light gray trim. The front facade features six large rectangular windows arranged symmetrically in two rows, with a single door and a wide garage door at street level. The rooftop is equipped with utility structures, including HVAC units, a vent, a satellite dish, and a small rooftop access enclosure. One side of the building has a full-height metal fire escape ladder, while the other side is plain and windowless. The building's exterior is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The overall structure suggests a utilitarian design typical of urban commercial office buildings.
description: A three-story pink office building with large windows, a flat roof with utility structures, and a street-level garage and door.
description_view_0: Front view showing six windows, a single door, a wide garage door, and rooftop utilities.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain, windowless pink wall and visible rooftop edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with a blank pink wall, visible rooftop structures, and no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Side view with two windows and a full-height metal fire escape ladder.
attribute_window_pattern: Symmetrical grid of large rectangular windows, two rows of three on the front facade, evenly spaced.
